name: word-order
description: Local-first repair for broken Word numbering, cross-references, and formatting.

scripts.build:pages: pnpm --filter @word-order/core build && pnpm --filter @word-order/web build && pnpm --filter @word-order/addin build && cp -R packages/addin/dist packages/web/dist/addin
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
